mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( id, orderer_name, orderer_phone, email, recipient, postcode, address, detail_address, used_credit, payment_method, depositor, bank_account, receipt_type, receipt_method, receipt_info, total_price, total_deposit, delivery_fee, final_price, created_at, delivery_message, buyer_request, recipient_phone, guest_password ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{ordererName}, #{ordererPhone}, #{email}, #{recipient}, #{postcode}, #{address}, #{detailAddress}, #{usedCredit}, #{paymentMethod}, #{depositor}, #{bankAccount}, #{receiptType}, #{receiptMethod}, #{receiptInfo}, #{totalPrice}, #{totalDeposit}, #{deliveryFee}, #{finalPrice}, NOW(), #{deliveryMessage}, #{buyerRequest}, #{recipientPhone}, #{guestPassword} )
mapper.select:
SELECT oi.item_id as itemId, oi.oid, oi.cid, oi.pid, oi.category, oi.title, oi.quantity, oi.price, oi.period, oi.size, oi.thumbnail, oi.order_status as orderStatus, o.final_price AS finalPrice, finish_type as finishType, oi.lease_start as leaseStart, oi.lease_end as leaseEnd, tracking_number as trackingNumber, tracking_company as trackingCompany, oi.retouch_enabled as retouchEnabled, oi.retouch_types as retouchTypes, oi.retouch_note as retouchNote,
oi.return_reason as reason, oi.return_detail as detail, oi.bank_name as bankName, oi.account_number as accountNumber, oi.account_holder as accountHolder FROM order_items oi join orders o ON oi.oid = o.oid WHERE oi.oid = #{oid}
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE id = #{id} AND created_at BETWEEN CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT oid FROM order_items WHERE item_id = #{itemId}

SELECT item_id as itemId, oid, cid, pid, category, title, author, quantity, price, deposit, finish_type as finishType, period, size, thumbnail, order_status as orderStatus, lease_start as leaseStart, lease_end as leaseEnd, tracking_number as trackingNumber, tracking_company as trackingCompany, retouch_enabled as retouchEnabled, retouch_types as retouchTypes, retouch_note as retouchNote,
return_reason as reason, return_detail as detail, bank_name as bankName, account_number as accountNumber, account_holder as accountHolder FROM order_items WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE order_items SET order_status = #{orderStatus}, return_reason = #{reason}, return_detail = #{detail}, bank_name = #{bankName}, account_number = #{accountNumber}, account_holder = #{accountHolder}
WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.select: SELECT order_status AS status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM order_items GROUP BY order_status
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_item_claim_file (item_id, file_url, original_name, file_size, img_order) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{fileUrl}, #{originalName}, #{fileSize}, #{imgOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT file_id AS fileId, item_id AS itemId, file_url AS fileUrl, original_name AS originalName, file_size AS fileSize, img_order AS imgOrder, created_at AS createdAt FROM order_item_claim_file WHERE item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY img_order ASC, file_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_item_file ( item_id, role, version, status, file_url, original_name, file_size, mime_type, uploaded_by, customer_feedback, delete_scheduled_at, deleted_at ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{role}, #{version}, #{status}, #{fileUrl}, #{originalName}, #{fileSize}, #{mimeType}, #{uploadedBy}, #{customerFeedback}, #{deleteScheduledAt}, #{deletedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT file_id AS fileId, item_id AS itemId, role, version, status, file_url AS fileUrl, original_name AS originalName, file_size AS fileSize, mime_type AS mimeType, uploaded_by AS uploadedBy, customer_feedback AS customerFeedback, created_at AS createdAt, delete_scheduled_at AS deleteScheduledAt, deleted_at AS deletedAt FROM order_item_file WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND role = #{role} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY version DESC, file_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT file_id AS fileId, item_id AS itemId, role, version, status, file_url AS fileUrl, original_name AS originalName, file_size AS fileSize, mime_type AS mimeType, uploaded_by AS uploadedBy, customer_feedback AS customerFeedback, created_at AS createdAt, delete_scheduled_at AS deleteScheduledAt, deleted_at AS deletedAt FROM order_item_file WHERE item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY role ASC, version DESC, file_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_item_file ( item_id, role, version, status, file_url, original_name, file_size, mime_type, uploaded_by, customer_feedback, delete_scheduled_at, deleted_at ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{role}, 1, #{status}, #{fileUrl}, #{originalName}, #{fileSize}, #{mimeType}, #{uploadedBy}, #{customerFeedback}, #{deleteScheduledAt}, #{deletedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE version = 1, status = VALUES(status), file_url = VALUES(file_url), original_name = VALUES(original_name), file_size = VALUES(file_size), mime_type = VALUES(mime_type), uploaded_by = VALUES(uploaded_by), customer_feedback = VALUES(customer_feedback), delete_scheduled_at = VALUES(delete_scheduled_at), deleted_at = VALUES(deleted_at), created_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT oi.item_id AS itemId, oi.oid AS oid, oi.title AS title, oi.order_status AS orderStatus, oi.retouch_types AS retouchTypes, oi.retouch_note AS retouchNote, o.created_at AS itemCreatedAt, f.status AS previewStatus, f.file_url AS previewUrl, f.customer_feedback AS customerFeedback, f.created_at AS previewCreatedAt, f.delete_scheduled_at as deleteScheduledAt, f.deleted_at AS deletedAt FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON o.oid = oi.oid LEFT JOIN order_item_file f ON f.item_id = oi.item_id AND f.role = 'RETOUCH_PREVIEW' AND f.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE o.id = #{id} AND oi.retouch_enabled = 1 ORDER BY oi.item_id DESC

SELECT oi.item_id AS itemId, oi.oid AS oid, o.id AS memberId, oi.title AS title, oi.retouch_enabled AS retouchEnabled, oi.order_status AS orderStatus, oi.retouch_types AS retouchTypes, oi.retouch_note AS retouchNote, oi.created_at AS createdAt,
f.status AS previewStatus, f.file_url AS previewUrl, f.customer_feedback AS customerFeedback, f.created_at AS previewCreatedAt, f.delete_scheduled_at AS deleteScheduledAt
FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON o.oid = oi.oid
LEFT JOIN order_item_file f ON f.item_id = oi.item_id AND f.role = 'RETOUCH_PREVIEW' AND f.deleted_at IS NULL
WHERE oi.retouch_enabled = 1 AND o.created_at BETWEEN CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
AND ( oi.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR o.id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(oi.oid AS CHAR) = #{keyword} OR CAST(oi.item_id AS CHAR) = #{keyword} )
AND f.file_id IS NULL
AND ( (#{status} = 'DELETED' AND f.deleted_at IS NOT NULL) OR (#{status} != 'DELETED' AND f.deleted_at IS NULL AND f.status = #{status}) )
ORDER BY oi.item_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE order_item_file SET status='APPROVED', delete_scheduled_at = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND role = 'RETOUCH_PREVIEW'
mapper.select: SELECT file_id AS fileId, item_id AS itemId, role, version, status, file_url as fileUrl, original_name as originalName, file_size as fileSize, mime_type AS mimeType, uploaded_by AS uploadedBy, customer_feedback AS customerFeedback, created_at AS createdAt, delete_scheduled_at AS deleteScheduledAt, deleted_at AS deletedAt FROM order_item_file WHERE role = 'RETOUCH_PREVIEW' AND status = 'APPROVED' AND file_url IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL AND delete_scheduled_at IS NOT NULL AND delete_scheduled_at <= NOW() ORDER BY delete_scheduled_at ASC, file_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE order_item_file SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
